description_long: This is a modern, angular sofa with a solid, blocky form and a uniform reddish-brown color. The sofa features three distinct seat sections and three corresponding backrest segments, each separated by subtle vertical indentations. The armrest is present only on the left side, forming a right-angled enclosure, while the right side is open, giving the piece an asymmetrical appearance. The backrest is high and straight, running the full length of the sofa, and the seat and back cushions are visually integrated into the main structure rather than being loose or separate. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs or underframe. The upholstery appears smooth and untextured, contributing to a sleek, contemporary look suitable for urban public spaces.
description: A modern, angular sofa with a solid reddish-brown finish, three integrated seat and back sections, and a single left-side armrest. The design is sleek, blocky, and visually seamless.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's high, straight backrest and the single left-side armrest, with the solid base extending to the floor.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three distinct seat and back sections, the left armrest, and the open right side, highlighting the sofa's asymmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the absence of an armrest on the right, with the same high backrest and solid base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, unbroken backrest and the sofa's solid, block-like rear profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three integrated, uniform seat and back cushions, visually segmented by vertical indentations, all attached and forming a continuous surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Single left-side armrest, straight and blocky, matching the height of the seat and backrest, with no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a continuous solid plinth extending to the floor, giving a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest segmented into three sections by vertical indentations, with no visible tufting or separate cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a smooth, matte finish; no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
